response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to detect scenes. 2. Identified a performance segment (00:00-01:57) and a talk segment (01:57-05:01). 3. Song 'Homesick' identified from on-screen text in the top-left corner. 4. Performers identified through character models (Flare, Fubuki, Watame, Polka). 5. Attempted to find lyrics via search tools but generic results returned. 6. Transcribed lyrics directly from the video. 7. Structured JSON response based on findings.
response.global_summary: The video features a full band performance by VTubers Shiranui Flare (vocals/keyboards), Shirakami Fubuki (bass), Tsunomaki Watame (guitar), and Omaru Polka (drums) during Shiranui Flare's 2026 birthday event, followed by a talk segment featuring Shiranui Flare introducing merchandise related to the event.

scenes.description: Full band performance of the song 'Homesick' by Shiranui Flare, Shirakami Fubuki, Tsunomaki Watame, and Omaru Polka. Shiranui Flare sings and plays keyboards. On-screen lyrics appear throughout.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shiranui Flare, Shirakami Fubuki, Tsunomaki Watame, Omaru Polka
